Work in progress, big plans

Not Another Tee Store

One person, one iPad, and a few ideas meant to make SAPIENs feel less like a shop and more like a crew.

FEATURE / A ⌾

Social Network

A community for everyone who backs the brand — a place to catch design trends early, publish your own designs, vote in polls, and hang out with people who get it. The community shapes what gets printed next.

FEATURE / B ▦

Stitched QR Code

Every tee ships with a unique QR code stitched in — your wearable business card. Someone loves your shirt? They scan it and land on your personal SAPIENs page: your recent pickups, your own designs, your cred.

FEATURE / C ↻

Subscription Drop

Pay yearly or quarterly — whatever suits you — and get two curated tees a month picked by the founder, plus extra goodies still being cooked up. A surprise drop on your doorstep, every month.

The plan

Current Roadmap

01
Now

Exhibition account on Instagram

The designs go public first as a gallery — an exhibition page to garner attention, reactions and honest suggestions.

02
Next

Convert to a sales account

If the response is favourable, the exhibition flips into a storefront and the first tees go on sale.

03
Then

Full-fledged website

Sales graduate to a proper home — with the community, QR pages and subscription drops built in. You're looking at the blueprint.

Step 01 is live

The Exhibition Is Open

The SAPIENs gallery starts on Instagram — come look around, tell me what deserves ink, and watch the rack grow.

▸ Follow the exhibition on Instagram
From the founder

"I'm a college student with a knack for design. One fine day I had my lightbulb-wala moment — what if this hobby could become something more? T-shirts might just work. Since then I've been designing on my iPad, and now the rack is full enough to show the world."

Vyom Shrivastava
Founder · Designer · The whole team
